title: Trading Systems & Algorithmic Bots
subtitle: From order book to live PnL — design, code, and operate trading bots that survive contact with the market
description: A rigorous, engineer-led course on building algorithmic trading systems: market microstructure, order types and execution, broker APIs (Alpaca, Interactive Brokers), strategy design, backtesting honestly, risk management, and going live without blowing up. Focus on what actually matters for retail-to-prosumer algorithmic trading in 2026.
audience: Developers and quantitative-minded traders who want to ship working trading bots. Comfortable with Python or TypeScript; understands basic finance concepts. Not a get-rich-quick course — this is engineering and risk management for trading systems.
prerequisites: Understand the basics of stocks/markets (price, volume, bid/ask)
Have or willing to open a paper-trading account (Alpaca free)
outcomes: Read a market microstructure with eyes that see the order book
Choose the right order type for the situation
Connect to Alpaca and Interactive Brokers APIs from code
Design strategies that have a real edge (not overfit)
Backtest honestly with realistic costs and slippage
Size positions and manage risk so bad trades don't kill the account
Operate a live bot — monitoring, kill switches, postmortems

modules.title: Markets and microstructure
modules.objective: How markets actually work at the level a bot must care about.

lessons.title: Order books and how prices form
Order types: market, limit, stop, IOC

modules.title: Connecting to brokers
modules.objective: Get a bot talking to a real (or paper) brokerage.

lessons.title: Market data: bars, ticks, and streams

modules.title: Strategy design
modules.objective: How to find and refine trading edges.

modules.title: Backtesting honestly
modules.objective: Get real signal from historical data without lying to yourself.

lessons.title: From backtest to walk-forward to paper

modules.title: Going live and staying alive
modules.objective: Operate a real trading bot without disaster.

lessons.title: The trader's mindset: surviving losing streaks
